description: A school group wants to purchase 50 tickets for a matinee theater performance.

nodes.task_description: Confirm availability of a 50-seat block for the requested performance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an available block of 50 seats in the mezzanine.

nodes.task_description: Apply the standard school group discount to the order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent applies a 15% discount to the tickets.

nodes.task_description: Generate an invoice for the school to pay via purchase order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates and sends an invoice for the discounted total.

nodes.task_description: Place the 50 seats on hold pending payment of the invoice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reserves the seats and sets a payment deadline.
